'''ât-w-n-y''' ('''katawneyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impale|impale]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impale|impale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-w-n-y
|-
! Lemma
| katawneyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawneyoko|thitawneyoko]] || [[word:jitawneyoko|jitawneyoko]] || [[word:shitawneyoko|shitawneyoko]] || [[word:kitawneyoko|kitawneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawneyoko|thuthutawneyoko]] || [[word:jujutawneyoko|jujutawneyoko]] || [[word:shushutawneyoko|shushutawneyoko]] || [[word:kukutawneyoko|kukutawneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawneyoko|thutawneyoko]] || [[word:jutawneyoko|jutawneyoko]] || [[word:shutawneyoko|shutawneyoko]] || [[word:kutawneyoko|kutawneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawneyoko|thutawneyoko]] || [[word:jutawneyoko|jutawneyoko]] || [[word:shutawneyoko|shutawneyoko]] || [[word:kutawneyoko|kutawneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawneyoko|thetawneyoko]] || [[word:jetawneyoko|jetawneyoko]] || [[word:shetawneyoko|shetawneyoko]] || [[word:ketawneyoko|ketawneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawneyoko|thothotawneyoko]] || [[word:jojotawneyoko|jojotawneyoko]] || [[word:shoshotawneyoko|shoshotawneyoko]] || [[word:kokotawneyoko|kokotawneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawneyoko|thotawneyoko]] || [[word:jotawneyoko|jotawneyoko]] || [[word:shotawneyoko|shotawneyoko]] || [[word:kotawneyoko|kotawneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawneyoko|thotawneyoko]] || [[word:jotawneyoko|jotawneyoko]] || [[word:shotawneyoko|shotawneyoko]] || [[word:kotawneyoko|kotawneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtawneyoko|thĂŠtawneyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtawneyoko|jĂŠtawneyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtawneyoko|shĂŠtawneyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtawneyoko|kĂŠtawneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawneyoko|thathatawneyoko]] || [[word:jajatawneyoko|jajatawneyoko]] || [[word:shashatawneyoko|shashatawneyoko]] || [[word:kakatawneyoko|kakatawneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawneyoko|thatawneyoko]] || [[word:jatawneyoko|jatawneyoko]] || [[word:shatawneyoko|shatawneyoko]] || [[word:katawneyoko|katawneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawneyoko|thatawneyoko]] || [[word:jatawneyoko|jatawneyoko]] || [[word:shatawneyoko|shatawneyoko]] || [[word:katawneyoko|katawneyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
